tasks.description: Disable ORCH-001 task type in orchestrator config
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/orchestrator-config.ts to comment out or remove ORCH-001 from validTaskTypes array. This breaks the cascade-blocking pattern causing 4-day deadlock. Keep AGENT, BACKEND, FRONTEND, INFRA types active.

tasks.description: Disable QUALITY-001 task type in quality gate config
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/quality-gate-config.ts to disable QUALITY-001 validation type. Remove from required checks array or set enabled: false. This eliminates the second cascade trigger point.

tasks.description: Clear rejection state in orchestrator service
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts to add manual state reset logic. Clear any cached rejection states or skip flags that persist across runs. Add clearRejectionState() method if needed.

tasks.description: Create minimal test sprint validation endpoint
tasks.context: Add POST /api/test-sprint endpoint in backend/src/routes/health.ts that triggers a single-task test sprint. Returns execution status. Use to verify orchestrator accepts tasks post-config changes.

tasks.description: Add pipeline health check to orchestrator
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts to add isPipelineHealthy() check before sprint execution. Returns false if rejection rate >50% over 24h window. Prevents future deadlocks.
